title: Accessibility + Final Polish

tasks.title: ARIA Labels on Grid Cells, Palette Items, and Buttons
tasks.description: Add aria-label attributes to all grid cells (describing content: empty, track type, scenery type, train), palette items (piece name), and control buttons (action name). Grid gets role='grid', each row gets role='row', each cell gets role='gridcell'.
changes: In initGrid(): Add role='gridcell', aria-label='Empty cell, row N, column N', tabindex='-1' to each cell div
In renderCell(): Update aria-label based on cell content (e.g., 'Straight track, row 3, column 5', 'Tree scenery', 'Red train')
Add role='grid' to the #grid element in initGrid()
Add aria-label attributes to all palette-piece elements in HTML
Add aria-label attributes to all control buttons in HTML
acceptance_criteria: Every grid cell has a descriptive aria-label reflecting its current content
Palette items have aria-labels like 'Straight track piece'
All buttons have aria-labels matching their function
Screen reader can describe any cell's contents

tasks.title: Keyboard Navigation: Tab Through Palette, Arrow Keys on Grid, Enter to Place
tasks.description: Enable full keyboard-only play. Tab navigates palette pieces (with visible focus ring). When grid is focused, arrow keys move a focus indicator between cells. Enter places the selected tool at the focused cell. Focus indicator is a visible outline.
changes: Add tabindex='0' to palette pieces and a visible :focus-visible style
Add a gridFocusRow/gridFocusCol state and a .grid-focus CSS class (bright outline)
In handleKeyDown: Arrow keys move grid focus when grid area is focused
Enter key places selectedTool at gridFocus position or rotates existing piece
Tab within grid moves to next occupied cell; Shift+Tab moves backwards
Add CSS .grid-focus class with bright 3px outline visible in both day/night modes
acceptance_criteria: Can Tab through all palette pieces with visible focus ring
Arrow keys move focus indicator on grid
Enter places selected tool at focused cell
Enter on occupied cell rotates it
Focus indicator clearly visible in both day and night modes
Keyboard-only play is fully possible

tasks.title: Colorblind-Friendly Connection Dots (Shape Difference)
tasks.description: Add shape differentiation to connection dots. Connected dots remain circles with green. Disconnected dots become small triangles/diamonds with red. This ensures colorblind users can distinguish connected from disconnected without relying on color alone.
changes: Change .connection-dot.disconnected to use a diamond/square shape via border-radius:2px instead of 50%
Add a subtle border to disconnected dots for extra visual distinction
Connected dots keep border-radius:50% (circle)
Add high-contrast mode support where dots have thicker borders
acceptance_criteria: Connected dots are round circles
Disconnected dots are square/diamond shapes
Shapes are distinguishable without color perception
Works in both day and night modes

tasks.title: High-Contrast Mode Toggle
tasks.description: Add a high-contrast mode that strengthens borders, makes colors bolder, and increases dot visibility. Toggle via button and stored in localStorage.
changes: Add body.high-contrast CSS class with stronger cell borders (2px solid), bolder track SVG strokes, larger connection dots
Add a high-contrast toggle button (♿) in the controls bar
Store preference in localStorage key 'trainTracks_highContrast'
Add keyboard shortcut 'A' for accessibility/high-contrast toggle
acceptance_criteria: High-contrast mode has visibly thicker borders on grid cells
Track SVG strokes are bolder in high-contrast
Connection dots are larger and have border outlines
Toggle persists across refreshes
Works with all biomes and night mode

tasks.title: Fullscreen Mode Button
tasks.description: Add a fullscreen toggle button using the requestFullscreen API. Recalculates grid size on fullscreen change.
changes: Add fullscreen button (⛶) in controls bar
Implement toggleFullscreen() using requestFullscreen/exitFullscreen
Listen for fullscreenchange event to update button text and recalculate size
Add keyboard shortcut 'F' for fullscreen toggle
acceptance_criteria: Fullscreen button enters fullscreen mode
Grid recalculates size in fullscreen
Button text updates (⛶ ↔ 🔲) to indicate state
F key toggles fullscreen
Works on desktop and mobile

tasks.title: Reduce Motion Preference
tasks.description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Disable all CSS animations, particles, and transition effects when the user prefers reduced motion.
changes: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) CSS block that sets animation: none, transition: none on particles, scenery, and decorative elements
Gate smoke particle spawning on !prefersReducedMotion()
Gate confetti spawning on !prefersReducedMotion()
Gate chimney smoke on !prefersReducedMotion()
Keep functional transitions (modal open/close) intact
acceptance_criteria: With prefers-reduced-motion set, no animations play
Smoke, confetti, chimney smoke particles don't spawn
Tree sway, cow flip, duck waddle all stop
Game is fully playable without any animations
Functional UI transitions preserved for usability

tasks.title: Final Bug Sweep + Polish
tasks.description: Run a comprehensive check across all features. Verify HTML validity, JS parse, and cross-feature interactions. Add any missing keyboard shortcut entries to the shortcuts modal.
changes: Add new shortcuts (F, A) to shortcuts modal HTML
Add new buttons to the controls row
Verify all modals have Escape handler entries
Verify all localStorage keys are consistent
acceptance_criteria: JS parses without errors
HTML tags are balanced
No duplicate code blocks
All keyboard shortcuts work
Shortcuts modal shows all current shortcuts

testing_focus: Keyboard-only gameplay from palette selection to track placement
Screen reader description of grid cells
Connection dot shapes distinguishable without color
High-contrast mode with all biomes and night mode
All existing features still work (regression test)
